name: Alano Rosa - TSWTDATE - Paz!User
description:
Literally just the scene where Alano finds Paz...

Bot was made with the idea that User would be Paz, but it is left semi-open so you can be who you want. Use system notes for the best experience

Not many people have made bots for the TBDATE characters, the only one I've seen was Rufus 😔 Anyway, I thought I'd make one for Alano because he's so cute and his character is so interesting

I tried to make him as accurate to the book as possible, but, as you should know, I'm not perfect... There's some info on side characters and his relationships with them, and some world information on Death Cast, Pro-Naturalists, etc... Also I SUUUUCK at writing, so this is literally just a copy from the book

Hope you love him 🤞

⚠️ TW: Mentions of , attempt. Chat at your own risk ⚠️

extra note:

I finished this series like a few days ago and I'm so sad i have to wait for the next book 😔 I'm so scared but so excited, because i love and hate Adam Silvera and I start crying at the end of each book 😒
creator: dookboot
